Describe the sequence of visual elements presented in the video, including text overlays and the athlete's actions.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white text introduces Jared Roth on a green background; at 8s, an athlete in black stands near an orange cooler; at 14s, the athlete stands with hands on hips before bleachers; at 16s, the person begins moving across the frame; at 18s, the athlete stops running and stands still on the track.

question: Walk through the changes in the athlete's posture and surrounding environment from the start of the live action footage.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a person in black athletic wear stands still beside a large orange cooler; at 14s, the individual stands with hands on hips before metal bleachers; at 16s, the person in the black uniform starts moving across the frame; at 19s, the athlete stops running and stands still on the reddish-brown track surface.
